'''Mechanized hold-tenders''' were [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-equipped [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. They lifted and moved cargo in the holds of [[blockade runner]]s. One such droid was made to attack [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] by [[13-K]] when it infiltrated a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] blockade runner.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 45}} {{1st}}
